# The Rooiberg Wander

> A private, exclusive 3-night / 3-day slackpacking trail on foot through 15,000 hectares
> of malaria-free Big 5 mountain wilderness near Rooiberg, Limpopo, South Africa (the Waterberg),
> about 2.5 hours by road from Johannesburg. Tagline: "Self-catering walking safari in the
> Waterberg".

## Key facts

- Format: a circuitous, point-to-point slackpacking trail. You walk while your luggage and
  provisions are moved between camps each day, kept cool and dry. Self-catered as standard
  (staff at each camp help with cooking, the barbeque and cleanup), or fully catered for a
  flat per-group supplement.
- Duration: 3 nights / 3 days. No walking on the arrival day (Day 1); depart immediately after
  the final walk on Day 4.
- Walking: three days of 15 to 20 km each, about 55 km in total.
- Terrain: the Groenkop and Elandsberg mountains, with deep kloofs, riverbeds and open savanna
  plains. Grading: moderate to challenging; a good level of hiking fitness is required.
- Malaria: 100% malaria-free.
- Group: a private guided walk for one group only, with exclusive use of each safari lodge
  overnight, for up to 10 guests (optional two extra by special arrangement). A second product,
  shared Monday departures, is a single fully catered shared departure each Monday for 2 to 8
  people, priced per person per night.
- Safety: the Two-Man Rule. Two qualified, armed trail guides accompany you at all times.
- Wildlife: a Big 5 reserve with more than 66 mammal species (lion, leopard, elephant, buffalo,
  cheetah, giraffe, plus wide-ranging plains game) and over 168 recorded bird species.
- Safari lodges (each with a swimming pool, equipped kitchen, refrigeration, barbeque, safe
  drinking water and free WiFi): Rotavi Lodge (valley basecamp, start & end), Oukraal (bush
  lodge, Night 2), ViervanAcht (mountain lodge, Night 3).
- Route: begins and ends at Rotavi Lodge. Over Groenkop to Oukraal (Day 2); up the high ridges
  via L-Kloof to ViervanAcht by way of the Welgedacht lookout, with views over Marakele (Day 3);
  across the plains along the Sand River back to Rotavi Lodge (Day 4).
- Price (no VAT is charged): private trail R52,174 per group, self-catered, or a flat R112,174
  per group fully catered (regardless of group size). Shared Monday departures: R3,435 per
  person per night (fully catered).
  Includes accommodation, two armed trail guides, daily baggage transport, camp assistants and
  all conservation levies. Excludes travel to and from Rotavi Lodge and personal travel
  insurance; food and beverages are excluded unless the catered option is chosen.
- Booking window: online bookings are accepted for start dates from 15 January 2027. Earlier
  dates are available to family and friends by enquiry or WhatsApp only, at a discount, during
  the beta phase (to 15 July 2027).
- Contact: Hanlie — WhatsApp +27 82 905 8832, office hours 08h00 to 17h00.

## Pages

- Home: /
- The Trail (day-by-day itinerary + route map): /the-trail
- The Safari Lodges (Rotavi Lodge, Oukraal, ViervanAcht): /sanctuaries
- Trail Logistics, Safety & FAQ (catering, safety, grading, malaria-free): /logistics
- Rates & Booking (pricing, what's included, cancellation policy): /rates

## Location

Near Rooiberg, Limpopo, South Africa, in the Waterberg region close to Marakele. About 2.5 hours
by road from Johannesburg.
